endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all operations available Azure Security Insights Resource Provider.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.
